articles.title: What is agentic engineering?
articles.description:
Agentic Engineering Patterns >
    I use the term agentic engineering to describe the practice of developing software with the assistance of coding agents.
What are coding agents? They're agents that can both write and execute code. Popular examples include Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, and Gemini

articles.title: Anthropic’s Claude AI can respond with charts, diagrams, and other visuals now
articles.description: Anthropic's latest update to Claude will allow the AI chatbot to generate custom charts, diagrams, and other visualizations during your conversation.
